//: Copy to appsettings.Production.json (gitignored) and paste your real RSA keypair. Mounted read-only into the API at /app/appsettings.Production.json and merged over appsettings.json because ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Production. ONLY the PowerSync signing key belongs here — every other secret goes in .env.prod. PEM newlines MUST be JSON-escaped as \n; produce the escaped string with:  jq -Rs . < powersync-private.pem
